runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Adopt Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.before:
if (request instanceof HttpServletRequest) {
		CleanServletRequest cleanRequest = new CleanServletRequest((HttpServletRequest)request, antiSamy);
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.after:
if (request instanceof HttpServletRequest servletRequest) {
		CleanServletRequest cleanRequest = new CleanServletRequest(servletRequest, antiSamy);

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace deprecated Charset.forName with StandardCharsets constant for modern Java style.
Migrate CookieLocaleResolver initialization to use constructor injection instead of setter.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Replace Optional.isPresent() with Optional.isEmpty() for more readable negation checks.
Refactor field injection to constructor injection and make fields final for better immutability and testability.
Rename method to reflect new behavior of warning before deletion.
Invert scheduler enabled check to fail-fast with a warning log.
Wrap deletion logic in try-catch to prevent scheduler failure from stopping the application.
Delegate date calculation for deletion to a dedicated service.
Add new functionality to warn users about upcoming deletion of running dinners.
Implement helper method to warn about deletion for a list of running dinners.
Enhance logging to include formatted dinner date and cancellation date.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.after: LOGGER.info("{} successfully deleted with dinner-date {} and cancel-date {}", runningDinner, getFormattedDinnerDate(runningDinner), runningDinner.getCancellationDate());

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Remove local date calculation method as it is now delegated to the service.
Add helper method to format dinner date for logging purposes.
Remove unused field for days to keep old dinners.
Make logger field final for immutability.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor injection to adopt Spring Boot's preferred convention of implicit constructor injection.
Remove unused import for the removed @Autowired annotation.
Replaced individual participant and team imports with a wildcard import for the participant package.
Added new imports for message service, message type, running dinner preferences, and local date time to support new warning logic.
Added constants for deletion retention period and warning lead time.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.after:
private static final int DAYS_TO_KEEP_OLD_DINNER = 5;
private static final int DAYS_BEFORE_DELETION_TO_WARN = 2;

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Injected MessageService and RunningDinnerService dependencies to enable sending warning messages and retrieving preferences.
Changed repository save method to saveAllAndFlush to ensure immediate persistence of participant changes.
Added method to warn users about upcoming dinner deletion by checking preferences and sending a message.
Added helper method to check if a user has already been warned about deletion.
Added helper methods to calculate filter dates for deletion and warning queries.
